conversations.content: Today we studied the Aurora New Energy Battery Assembly Plant High-Risk Area Safety Operation Code. If an employee is found violating red-line rules in an explosion-proof workshop...
Violating rules in an explosion-proof workshop? They must have a death wish! What happens when caught?
then the safety officer must immediately force-stop their operation and remove them from the danger zone.
Immediate stop and removal — safety first! Then penalties based on violation severity, right?

Then further action is determined based on the situation: if failing to wear anti-static clothing or insulating protective gear as required, impose a fine of 500 yuan and a three-day work suspension for reflection.
No protective gear gets a 500 yuan fine and three days off — still humane. What about privately short-circuiting safety interlock devices to save trouble?
If privately short-circuiting the safety interlock device to save effort, issue a serious demerit, transfer them from the core operation post, and reduce their salary.
Short-circuiting the interlock? That's suicide! Demotion and salary cut is letting them off easy. The worst is using an open flame, right?

If using an open flame or hot-plugging an electrical plug near flammable gas pipelines in violation of rules, it is determined as severely endangering public safety, resulting in immediate dismissal and industry-wide notification.

think: Aurora New Energy: employee violates red-line rules in explosion-proof workshop → safety officer force-stop + remove from danger zone → three outcomes: no anti-static/insulating gear = fine 500 yuan + 3-day suspension; short-circuit safety interlock = serious demerit + transfer + salary cut; open flame/hot-plug near flammable gas = severely endangering public safety, dismissal + industry-wide notification.
memory: Aurora New Energy Battery Assembly Plant High-Risk Area Safety Operation Code: If an employee is found violating red-line rules in an explosion-proof workshop, then the safety officer must immediately force-stop their operation and remove them from the danger zone, then further action is determined based on the situation: if failing to wear anti-static clothing or insulating protective gear as required, impose a fine of 500 yuan and a three-day work suspension for reflection; if privately short-circuiting the safety interlock device to save effort, issue a serious demerit, transfer them from the core operation post, and reduce their salary; if using an open flame or hot-plugging an electrical plug near flammable gas pipelines in violation of rules, it is determined as severely endangering public safety, resulting in immediate dismissal and industry-wide notification.
